title: glochidion flexuosum
intro: Glochidion flexuosum, also known as the "Flexuous Glochidion" or "Tongkat Ali", is a plant species belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Glochidion flexuosum include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and treating wounds, as well as being used as a natural remedy for high blood pressure and diabetes. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in the form of a decoction or infusion, and its extracts are also used in modern medicine to create various pharmaceutical products.
